data.name: Hunk Empire
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Hunk Empire, where dreams, ambition, and secrets intertwine in the heart of California. In this visual novel, you play a young man thrust into a world he barely understands. A world of adult entertainment, family legacies, and risky opportunities. After being kicked out by your mother, you’re forced to rebuild your life under the shadow of your estranged father, Leonard King, a controversial adult industry mogul.

Hunk Empire is a explicit visual novel/lite business management game made in Full HD, with the following themes; Gay, Romance, Humor, Polyamory, Group Sex, Muscle Worship.


This game contains the Arc 1 storyline. Future arcs will become available as DLC.
Studio upgrades become available as the story progresses across the different arcs.

Features

  • The Arc 1 (Season) story line.

  • 800+ CG Full HD images!

  • 42 Sex scenes to unlock!

  • 12 Sexy Hunks to meet, get to know... and to have fun with.

  • 50K+ words

  • 30 Steam Achievements

  • Extensive gallery system with control keys for one-handed use.

  • A Story line taking you deep into the adult industry, both behind as in front of the camera.

  • Huge soundtrack with music fitting to the M.C's mood.

  • Character book with details and lore about the characters

As you navigate the vibrant yet gritty streets of Riveroaks, you’ll forge connections, make tough choices, and carve out your own path. Will you rise to the challenge of running your father’s newly-founded gay-focused studio, or will you find your own calling amidst the chaos of an industry driven by desire and power? Along the way, you’ll meet a diverse cast of characters, each with their own aspirations, secrets, and unique roles in your journey.

data.short_description: Kicked out and pulled into his dad’s outrageous adult film empire, a young gay man must build a scrappy new studio. Flirt, film, and manage your way past rivals and wild personalities to turn chaos into your very own gay empire.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel/AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11 (integrated graphics OK)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 12 (Monterey) or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2.0 GHz (64-bit) or Apple Silicon via Rosetta 2
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible (integrated graphics OK)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or later (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel/AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 compatible GPU (integrated graphics OK)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Other modern 64-bit distros should work; requires 64-bit libraries for SDL2/OpenGL.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel/AMD
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11 (integrated graphics OK)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: macOS 12 (Monterey) or later
  • Processor: Intel Core 2.0 GHz (64-bit) or Apple Silicon via Rosetta 2
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 compatible (integrated graphics OK)
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or later (64-bit)
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel/AMD
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 compatible GPU (integrated graphics OK)
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Other modern 64-bit distros should work; requires 64-bit libraries for SDL2/OpenGL.
